UIDescription.NativeString: Prove your skill in this competitive mode!  During each match, you'll earn points by either achieving high placements or eliminating multiple opponents.  As you gain points, you'll compete against tougher opponents with similar scores.
Pair up with a buddy and take everyone else down.

Prove your skill in this competitive mode!  During each match, you'll earn points by either achieving high placements or eliminating multiple opponents.  As you gain points, you'll compete against tougher opponents with similar scores.

Prove your skill in this competitive mode!  During each match, you'll earn points by either achieving high placements or eliminating multiple opponents.  As you gain points, you'll compete against tougher opponents with similar scores.
Go it alone in a battle to be the last one standing.
Go it alone in a battle to be the last one standing.

Thanos and his Chitauri horde invades the Battle Royale island, in search of the six Infinity Stones. Fighting against them is a team of heroes wielding mythic Avengers items.

Each time a stone is found, Thanos & his army will grow more powerful. If all six are found, the heroes will no longer be able to respawn, and Thanos can eliminate those who remain to win. 

Chitauri will respawn when eliminated until their army is decimated. They must help Thanos find the stones before this happens to achieve victory.
Classic Battle Royale with Three-Person Squads.
